name: Wukong Monkey King's Journey West
short_description: Quirky Journey to the West: Wukong has learned more skills—capture balls, rocket launchers, and dark magic to subdue demons. If the teachings don't resonate, I also know a bit of hand-to-hand combat.
detailed_description: This is a super mixed game—I've stitched together all the gameplay elements I could think of, which left me pondering what tags to assign to this game… Survival building, farming, monster capturing, Souls-like elements, adventure, weapon crafting, shooting combat, Roguelike—you name it, it's here! If you have any other gameplay ideas that could be added, let me know! With this game on Steam, you won't need any other!
about_the_game: This is a super mixed game—I've stitched together all the gameplay elements I could think of, which left me pondering what tags to assign to this game… Survival building, farming, monster capturing, Souls-like elements, adventure, weapon crafting, shooting combat, Roguelike—you name it, it's here! If you have any other gameplay ideas that could be added, let me know! With this game on Steam, you won't need any other!
supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Russian*, Turkish*, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese*, Portuguese - Portugal*, Korean*
*languages with full audio support
